eeoffsets.remarks: Adaptive fuel value for the front cylinder
eeoffsets.name: AFV Front

eeoffsets.remarks: Average IAC position when PID control is active
eeoffsets.name: Idle Air Control Average Position

eeoffsets.remarks: Count of Active Intake actuations since cleared
eeoffsets.name: Active Intake Actuations

eeoffsets.remarks: Julian date (day of year) of manufacture
eeoffsets.name: ECM Manufacturing Day

eeoffsets.remarks: AMC status when ignition is switched on
eeoffsets.name: AMC Key-On Status

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of rides since a trouble code was set
eeoffsets.name: Number of Rides since Error Set
Engine Running RPM Hysteresis High Value
Engine Running RPM Hysteresis Low Value

eeoffsets.remarks: TPS voltage with a fully closed throttle, written on a TPS reset
eeoffsets.name: Throttle Position Sensor Reset Voltage

eeoffsets.remarks: TPS voltage difference from fully closed to WOT
eeoffsets.name: Throttle Position Sensor Voltage Range

eeoffsets.remarks: TPS degrees difference from fully closed to WOT
eeoffsets.name: Throttle Position Sensor Degrees Range

eeoffsets.remarks: TPS fraction used to detect TP changes
eeoffsets.name: Throttle Position Sensor Moving Average Fraction

eeoffsets.remarks: O2 sensor voltage indicating a rich mixture
eeoffsets.name: O2 Sensor Rich Voltage

eeoffsets.remarks: O2 sensor voltage indicating a lean mixture
eeoffsets.name: O2 Sensor Lean Voltage

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum RPM to activate O2 sensor
eeoffsets.name: Closed Loop Feature Minimum RPM

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum throttle to activate O2 sensor
eeoffsets.name: Closed Loop Feature Minimum Throttle

eeoffsets.remarks: Max engine temp for pre-sync fuel pulses
eeoffsets.name: Pre Sync Fuel Maximum Engine Temperature

eeoffsets.remarks: Max engine temp for post-sync fuel pulses
eeoffsets.name: Post Sync Fuel Maximum Engine Temperature

eeoffsets.remarks: Global fuel correction factor, applied to all map regions
eeoffsets.name: Global Fuel Correction

eeoffsets.remarks: TPS change indicating a light accel. condition
eeoffsets.name: Light Acceleration Condition

eeoffsets.remarks: Change in throttle movement indicationg a full acceleration condition
eeoffsets.name: Full Acceleration Condition

eeoffsets.remarks: Full acceleration enrichment duration in engine revs
eeoffsets.name: Acceleration Enrichment Duration

eeoffsets.remarks: Acceleration enrichment adjustment on engine temperature
eeoffsets.name: Acceleration Enrichment Temperature Adjustment

eeoffsets.remarks: Engine revs for deceleration learn mode
eeoffsets.name: Deceleration Learn Minimum Duration

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of consecutive rich O2 readings required
eeoffsets.name: Deceleration Learn Minimum Readings

eeoffsets.remarks: Default fuel correction, applied to WOT regions
eeoffsets.name: WOT Enrichment

eeoffsets.remarks: Default fuel correction, applied to open loop regions
eeoffsets.name: Open Loop Default Correction

eeoffsets.remarks: Front cylinder fuel enrichment on engine temperature
eeoffsets.name: Front Cylinder Correction

eeoffsets.remarks: Engine temperature indicating a hot start condition
eeoffsets.name: Hot Start Condition

eeoffsets.remarks: Delay before reading barometric pressure sensor when switching on ignition
eeoffsets.name: Baro Pressure Sensor Delay

eeoffsets.remarks: Baro Pressure Sensor Moving Average Factor
eeoffsets.name: Baro Pressure Sensor Moving Average Factor

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum valid barometric pressure sensor reading when switching on ignition
eeoffsets.name: Barometric Pressure Key-On Minimum Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Maximum valid barometric pressure sensor reading when switching on ignition
eeoffsets.name: Barometric Pressure Key-On Maximum Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Upper closed loop boundary hysteresis, TPP
eeoffsets.name: Closed Loop Upper Boundary Load Hysteresis

eeoffsets.remarks: Lower closed loop boundary hysteresis, TPP
eeoffsets.name: Closed Loop Lower Boundary Load Hysteresis

eeoffsets.remarks: Closed loop upper boundary RPM hysteresis
eeoffsets.name: Closed Loop Upper Boundary RPM Hysteresis

eeoffsets.remarks: Closed loop lower boundary RPM hysteresis
eeoffsets.name: Closed Loop Lower Boundary RPM Hysteresis

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of O2 sensor readings required to adjust AFV
eeoffsets.name: Calibration Mode Number of Readings

eeoffsets.remarks: Time between AFV writes to EEPROM
eeoffsets.name: AFV Storage Delay

eeoffsets.remarks: Maximum engine temperature to enable calibration mode
eeoffsets.name: Calibration Mode Maximum Engine Temperature

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum engine temperature to enable calibration mode
eeoffsets.name: Calibration Mode Minimum Engine Temperature

eeoffsets.remarks: PI controller high value RPM limit
eeoffsets.name: Fuel PI Controller High RPM Threshold

eeoffsets.remarks: PI controller high value load limit
eeoffsets.name: Fuel PI Controller High Load Threshold

eeoffsets.remarks: High P value used for PI controller
eeoffsets.name: Fuel PI Controller High P-Value

eeoffsets.remarks: High I value used for PI controller
eeoffsets.name: Fuel PI Controller High I-Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Low P value used for PI controller
eeoffsets.name: Fuel PI Controller Low P-Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Low I value used for PI controller
eeoffsets.name: Fuel PI Controller Low I-Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Idle P value used for PI controller
eeoffsets.name: Fuel PI Controller Idle P-Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Idle I value used for PI controller
eeoffsets.name: Fuel PI Controller Idle I-Value
Fuel Pulse Endpoint Table for Engine Temperature
Fuel Pulse Endpoint Table for Load

eeoffsets.remarks: Showerhead pulse end point, ET based
eeoffsets.name: 2nd Fuel Puls Endpoint Temperature Correction

eeoffsets.remarks: Showerhead pulse end point, load based
eeoffsets.name: 2nd Fuel Pulse Endpoint Throttle Correction

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum RPM to enable spark advance adjusting
eeoffsets.name: Timed Spark Adjust Minimum RPM
Air Temperature Spark Advance Reduction Scaling

eeoffsets.remarks: Time to count speed sensor pulses
eeoffsets.name: VS-RPM Ratio VS Sampling Time

eeoffsets.remarks: Spark advance and fuel reduction configuration
eeoffsets.name: Spark Advance Retard Configuration

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum engine temperature to enable reduction
eeoffsets.name: Spark Advance Retard Minimum Engine Temperature
Spark Advance Reduction Upper RPM Boundary
Spark Advance Reduction Lower RPM boundary

eeoffsets.remarks: The spark advance reduction while noise abatement is active
eeoffsets.name: Spark Advance Reduction

eeoffsets.remarks: Active intake ramp-in period duty cycle
eeoffsets.name: Active Intake Ramp In Duty Cycle

eeoffsets.remarks: Active intake hold period duty cycle
eeoffsets.name: Active Intake Hold Duty Cycle

eeoffsets.remarks: Active intake ramp-out period duty cycle
eeoffsets.name: Active Intake Ramp Out Duty Cycle

eeoffsets.remarks: High speed speed-RPM-ratio hysteresis, upper value
eeoffsets.name: RPM High Speed Hysteresis High Value

eeoffsets.remarks: High speed speed-RPM-ratio hysteresis, lower value
eeoffsets.name: RPM High Speed Hysteresis Low Value

eeoffsets.remarks: RPM threshold to start limit timer at high speed
eeoffsets.name: RPM High Speed Timed Limit Timer Start

eeoffsets.remarks: RPM threshold to reset limit timer at high speed
eeoffsets.name: RPM High Speed Timed Limit Timer Reset

eeoffsets.remarks: RPM threshold to enable delayed hard limit at high speed
eeoffsets.name: RPM High Speed Timed Hard Limit

eeoffsets.remarks: RPM threshold to enable delayed soft limit at high speed
eeoffsets.name: RPM High Speed Timed Soft Limit

eeoffsets.remarks: Soft limit delay at high speed
eeoffsets.name: RPM High Speed Timed Soft Limit Delay

eeoffsets.remarks: Hard limit delay at high speed
eeoffsets.name: RPM High Speed Timed Hard Limit Delay

eeoffsets.remarks: RPM threshold to start limit timer at low speed
eeoffsets.name: RPM Low Speed Timed Limit Timer Start

eeoffsets.remarks: RPM threshold to reset limit timer at low speed
eeoffsets.name: RPM Low Speed Timed Limit Timer Reset

eeoffsets.remarks: RPM threshold to enable delayed hard limit at low speed
eeoffsets.name: RPM Low Speed Timed Hard Limit

eeoffsets.remarks: RPM threshold to enable delayed soft limit at low speed
eeoffsets.name: RPM Low Speed Timed Soft Limit

eeoffsets.remarks: Soft limit delay at low speed
eeoffsets.name: RPM Low Speed Timed Soft Limit Delay

eeoffsets.remarks: Hard limit delay at low speed
eeoffsets.name: RPM Low Speed Timed Hard Limit Delay

eeoffsets.remarks: Load above which soft temp limit enabled
eeoffsets.name: Temperature Soft Limit Minimum Load

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum RPM to enable temperature soft limit
eeoffsets.name: Temperature Soft Limit Minimum RPM

eeoffsets.remarks: Load above which hard temp limit enabled
eeoffsets.name: Temperature Hard Limit Minimum Load

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum RPM to enable temperature hard limit
eeoffsets.name: Temperature Hard Limit Minimum RPM

eeoffsets.remarks: Temperature threshold to trigger soft limit
eeoffsets.name: Temperature Soft Limit Trigger

eeoffsets.remarks: Temperature threshold to recharge soft limit
eeoffsets.name: Temperature Soft Limit Recharge

eeoffsets.remarks: Temperature trheshold to trigger hard limit
eeoffsets.name: Temperature Hard Limit Trigger

eeoffsets.remarks: Temperature threshold to recharge hard limit
eeoffsets.name: Temperature Hard Limit Recharge

eeoffsets.remarks: Temperature threshold indicating to ignore RPM/throttle limits
eeoffsets.name: Ignore Minimum RPM Trigger

eeoffsets.remarks: Temperature threshold indicating to obey RPM/throttle limits
eeoffsets.name: Ignore Minimum RPM Recharge

eeoffsets.remarks: Temperature trheshold to trigger hard limit
eeoffsets.name: Temperature Kill Limit Trigger

eeoffsets.remarks: Temperature threshold to recharge kill limit
eeoffsets.name: Temperature Kill Limit Recharge

eeoffsets.remarks: Temperature threshold to switch on engine lamp
eeoffsets.name: Temperature Limit Engine Lamp On Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Temperature threshold to switch off engine lamp
eeoffsets.name: Temperature Limit Engine Lamp Off Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Temperature threshold to switch on fan
eeoffsets.name: Fan Key-On On Temperature

eeoffsets.remarks: Temperature threshold to switch off fan
eeoffsets.name: Fan Key-On Off Temperature

eeoffsets.remarks: Key-off temperature threshold to switch on fan
eeoffsets.name: Fan Key-Off On Temperature

eeoffsets.remarks: Key-off temperature threshold to switch off fan
eeoffsets.name: Fan Key-Off Off Temperature

eeoffsets.remarks: Maximum time running fan after key-off
eeoffsets.name: Fan Key-Off Maximum Duration

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum battery voltage to run fan after key-off
eeoffsets.name: Fan Key-Off Minimum Battery Voltage

eeoffsets.remarks: Delay before switching on fan 2 after turning on fan 1
eeoffsets.name: Fan 2 Delay

eeoffsets.remarks: Active exhaust valve WOT condition hysteresis
eeoffsets.name: Active Muffler WOT Condition Hysteresis

eeoffsets.remarks: Active exhaust valve controller minimum on-time
eeoffsets.name: Active Muffler Motor Minimum On Time

eeoffsets.remarks: Active exhaust valve controller minimum off-time
eeoffsets.name: Active Muffler Motor Minimum Off Time

eeoffsets.remarks: Shift light on time while flashing
eeoffsets.name: Shift Light Flashing Period

eeoffsets.remarks: Shift Light flashing above this speed
eeoffsets.name: Shift Light Flashing RPM Hysteresis High

eeoffsets.remarks: Shift Light stops flashing below this speed
eeoffsets.name: Shift Light Flashing RPM Hysteresis Low

eeoffsets.remarks: Shift Light on above this speed
eeoffsets.name: Shift Light On RPM Hysteresis High

eeoffsets.remarks: Shift Light off below this speed
eeoffsets.name: Shift Light Off RPM Hysteresis Low

eeoffsets.remarks: Max RPM for starter relay upper hysteresis
eeoffsets.name: Starter Relay Maximum RPM Hysteresis High

eeoffsets.remarks: Max RPM for starter relay lower hysteresis
eeoffsets.name: Starter Relay Maximum RPM Hysteresis Low

eeoffsets.remarks: Sidestand interlock disabled after reaching speed
eeoffsets.name: Sidestand Interlock Maximum Speed

eeoffsets.remarks: Sidestand extended at high speed before failure
eeoffsets.name: Sidestand Input Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Running IAC Position Map Engine Temp. Axis
eeoffsets.name: Running IAC Position Map Engine Temp. Axis

eeoffsets.remarks: Running IAC Position Map Gear Axis
eeoffsets.name: Running IAC Position Map Gear Axis

eeoffsets.remarks: IAC Position Map for running in gear
eeoffsets.name: Running (Gear) IAC Position Map

eeoffsets.xaxis: Running IAC Position Map RPM Axis
eeoffsets.yaxis: Running IAC Position Map Engine Temp. Axis
eeoffsets.name: Idle Air Control Setpoint Table

eeoffsets.remarks: IAC RPM setpoint correction for startup
eeoffsets.name: Idle Air Control Startup Correction

eeoffsets.remarks: Throttle position adjustment table for IAC position
eeoffsets.name: Idle Air Control Throttle Position Adjustment

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum key-on time before KTPS0 can be increased
eeoffsets.name: TPS Auto-Zero Minimum Key-On Time

eeoffsets.remarks: Battery voltage above which aux relay turned on
eeoffsets.name: Aux Power Relay On Battery Voltage

eeoffsets.remarks: Battery voltage below which aux relay turned off
eeoffsets.name: Aux Power Relay Off Battery Voltage

eeoffsets.remarks: No plug cleaning needed if TE exceeds this
eeoffsets.name: Spark Plug Cleaning Maximum Engine Temperature

eeoffsets.remarks: Terminate plug cleaning waste fires above this TE
eeoffsets.name: Spark Plug Cleaning Waste Fire Maximum Engine Temperature

eeoffsets.remarks: Min time for engine run event for plug cleaning
eeoffsets.name: Spark Plug Cleaning Engine Minimum Run Time

eeoffsets.remarks: Cold run events before plug cleaning needed
eeoffsets.name: Spark Plug Cleaning Number of Cold Runs

eeoffsets.remarks: Plug cleaning waste fires per rev
eeoffsets.name: Spark Plug Cleaning Number of Waste Fires

eeoffsets.remarks: Fuel pressure setpoint table for engine temperature
eeoffsets.name: Fuel Pressure Setpoint for Engine Temperature

eeoffsets.remarks: Load axis for fuel pressure setpoint map
eeoffsets.name: Fuel Pressure Setpoint Load Axis

eeoffsets.remarks: RPM axis for fuel pressure setpoint map
eeoffsets.name: Fuel Pressure Setpoint RPM Axis

eeoffsets.remarks: Fuel pressure setpoint map for RPM and load
eeoffsets.name: Fuel Pressure Setpoint

eeoffsets.remarks: Fuel pressure axis for voltage and fuel pressure correction map
eeoffsets.name: Voltage and Fuel Pressure Correction Temperature Axis

eeoffsets.remarks: Battery axis for voltage and fuel pressure correction map
eeoffsets.name: Voltage and Fuel Pressure Correction Battery Axis

eeoffsets.remarks: Injector adder based on fuel pressure and battery
eeoffsets.name: Voltage and Fuel Pressure Correction

eeoffsets.xaxis: Voltage and Fuel Pressure Correction Battery Axis
eeoffsets.yaxis: Voltage and Fuel Pressure Correction Temperature Axis
eeoffsets.name: Fuel Pulse Endpoint Load Axis

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of rides without error codes set to clear store errors
eeoffsets.name: Rides Required to Clear DTC

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of TPS read failures before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Throttle Position Sensor Number of Errors
Throttle Position Sensor Highest Reading Allowed
Throttle Position Sensor Lowest Reading Allowed

eeoffsets.remarks: TPS default value set on failure
eeoffsets.name: Throttle Position Sensor Default Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum RPM to check for O2 activity
eeoffsets.name: O2 Sensor Test Minimum RPM

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum throttle to check for O2 activity
eeoffsets.name: O2 Sensor Test Minimum Throttle

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of O2 sensor read failures before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: O2 Sensor Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of inactive results before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: O2 Sensor Number of Inactive Reads

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of ET sensor read failures before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Engine Temperature Sensor Number of Errors
Engine Temperature Sensor Highest Reading Allowed
Engine Temperature Sensor Lowest Reading Allowed

eeoffsets.remarks: ET sensor default value set on failure
eeoffsets.name: Engine Temperature Sensor Default Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Maximum allowed air temperature sensor reading
eeoffsets.name: Air Temperature Sensor Highest Reading Allowed

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum allowed air temperature sensor reading
eeoffsets.name: Air Temperature Sensor Lowest Reading Allowed

eeoffsets.remarks: Air temperature sensor default value, set on failure
eeoffsets.name: Air Temperature Sensor Default Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of air temperature sensor test failures before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Air Temperature Sensor Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Maximum difference allowed between average high and low battery voltage
eeoffsets.name: Battery Average Voltage Difference Limit

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum engine speed to perform battery voltage tests
eeoffsets.name: Battery Voltage Test Minimum RPM

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of battery voltage test failures before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Battery Voltage Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Battery voltage default value, set on failure
eeoffsets.name: Battery Voltage Default Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of AMC test failures before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Active Muffler Controller Number of Tests Failed

eeoffsets.remarks: Maximum time allowed for AMC feedback
eeoffsets.name: Active Muffler Controller Max Feedback Time

eeoffsets.remarks: Maximum TPS reading while AIC is active
eeoffsets.name: Active Intake Maximum TPS Reading Allowed

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of failed active intake tests before setting an error code
eeoffsets.name: Active Intake Error Counts

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of injector feedback test failures before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Injector Feedback Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of failed coil feedback tests before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Coil Feedback Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of vehicle speed samples for clutch diagnostic tests
eeoffsets.name: Clutch Test Number of VSS Samples

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum load to run clutch diagnostic tests
eeoffsets.name: Clutch Test Minimum Load

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of failed clutch diagnostic tests before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Clutch Test Timeout

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of vehicle speed samples for neutral diagnostic tests
eeoffsets.name: Neutral Test Number of VSS Samples

eeoffsets.remarks: Off time before fuel pump feedback checked
eeoffsets.name: Fuel Pump Feedback Off Time before Test

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of fuelpump feedback test failures before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Fuel Pump Feedback Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: IAC position high diagnostic limit 255 disables)
eeoffsets.name: Idle Air Control Position Test Limit High
Idle Air Control Position Test Limit Low
Idle Air Control Highest Reading Allowed
Idle Air Control Lowest Reading Allowed

eeoffsets.remarks: Idle air control position diagnostic timeout
eeoffsets.name: Idle Air Control Position Test Timeout

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of tacho feedback test failures before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Tacho Feedback Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Fan off-time before running feedback test
eeoffsets.name: Fan Feedback Off Time before Test

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of failed fan tests before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Fan Feedback Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Maximum bank angle sensor reading allowed (alternative: shifter configuration)
eeoffsets.name: Bank Angle Sensor Highest Reading Allowed

eeoffsets.remarks: Bank angle sensor tip-over value (alternative: shifter minimum delay between activations)
eeoffsets.name: Bank Angle Sensor Tip-Over Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum bank angles sensor reading allowed (alternative: shifter debounce period)
eeoffsets.name: Bank Angle Sensor Lowest Reading Allowed

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of bank angle sensor test failures before error code is set (alternative: shifter fuel cut duration)
eeoffsets.name: Bank Angle Sensor Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Bank angle sensor tip-over detection delay (alternative: shifter maximum input activation value)
eeoffsets.name: Bank Angle Sensor Tipover Delay
Aux Power Relay Test Feedback Timeout

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of failed EEPROM checksum tests before error code set
eeoffsets.name: EEPROM Test Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of failed A/D conversion tests before error code set
eeoffsets.name: AD-Converter Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum RPM to set lost sync error
eeoffsets.name: Camshaft Sensor Test Minimum RPM

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of revs without sync detected before error code set
eeoffsets.name: Camshaft Sensor Number of Sync Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of consecutive out-of-sync revs before error code set
eeoffsets.name: Camshaft Sensor Test Number of Consecutive Sync Errors
Air Temperature Maximum Spark Advance Reduction

bits.bit2: Sidestand failure at end of last run
bits.name: AMC Startup Configuration

bits.bit7: TPS too high/short to supply voltage
bits.bit2: Eng. Temp. Voltg. too high/short to ground
bits.bit4: Rear O2 always lean
bits.bit8: Cooling fan 1 (rear or right) short to ground
bits.bit1: Eng. Temp. Voltg. too low/broken wire
bits.name: Error Mask Byte 0

bits.bit4: Injector 1 short to supply voltage
bits.bit8: Air Temperature too high/short to ground
bits.bit1: Coil 1 short to ground or open
bits.name: Error Mask Byte 1

bits.bit2: Tachometer output short to supply voltage
bits.bit4: Fuel pump short to supply voltage
bits.name: Error Mask Byte 2

bits.bit4: Flash Memory Checksum Error
bits.name: Error Mask Byte 3
bits.bit6: Fan 1 (rear or right) short to supply voltage

bits.bit4: AMC short to supply voltage
bits.name: Error Mask Byte 4

bits.bit7: AIC short to ground or open
bits.bit4: Neutral short to supply voltage
bits.bit1: Starter relay short to supply voltage
bits.name: Error Mask Byte 5

bits.bit5: VS output short to ground/broken wire
bits.bit4: VS input short to supply voltage
bits.name: Error Mask Byte 6

bits.bit3: Fuel pressure sensor short to ground
bits.bit4: Fuel pressure sensor short to supply voltage/broken wire
bits.name: Error Mask Byte 7

bits.bit4: Crank sensor short to supply voltage
bits.bit8: Baro short to supply voltage/broken wire
bits.name: Error Mask Byte 8
bits.bit6: MAP short to supply voltage/broken wire

bits.bit4: Cluster low fuel too high
bits.name: Error Mask Byte 10

bits.bit7: TPS too high/short to supply voltage
bits.bit2: Engine Temperature too high/short to ground
bits.bit4: Rear O2 always lean
bits.bit8: Cooling fan 1 (rear or right) short to ground
bits.name: Stored Errors Byte 0

bits.bit4: Injector 1 short to supply voltage
bits.bit8: Air Temperature too high/short to ground
bits.bit1: Coil 1 short to ground or open
bits.name: Stored Errors Byte 1

bits.bit2: Tachometer output short to supply voltage
bits.bit4: Fuel pump short to supply voltage
bits.name: Stored Errors Byte 2

bits.bit4: Flash Memory Checksum Error
bits.name: Stored Errors Byte 3
bits.bit6: Fan 1 (rear or right) short to supply voltage

bits.bit4: AMC short to supply voltage
bits.name: Stored Errors Byte 4

bits.bit7: AIC short to ground or open
bits.bit4: Neutral short to supply voltage
bits.bit1: Starter relay short to supply voltage
bits.name: Stored Errors Byte 5

bits.bit5: VS output short to ground/broken wire
bits.bit4: VS input short to supply voltage
bits.name: Stored Errors Byte 6

bits.bit3: Fuel pressure sensor short to ground
bits.bit4: Fuel pressure sensor short to supply voltage/broken wire
bits.name: Stored Errors Byte 7

bits.bit4: Crank sensor short to supply voltage
bits.bit8: Baro short to supply voltage/broken wire
bits.name: Stored Errors Byte 8
bits.bit6: MAP short to supply voltage/broken wire

bits.bit4: Cluster low fuel too high
bits.name: Stored Errors Byte 10

bits.bit7: Use Baro (instead of MAP) input for ABP
bits.bit4: (reserved)
bits.name: Airbox Pressure Sensor Configuration
bits.bit6: Read and apply baro press. continuously

bits.bit3: Accel corr. based on fuel table delta
bits.bit4: Accel corr. applied to fuel length (not raw map value)
bits.bit1: Apply additional pulse on opposite injector in full accel.
bits.name: Acceleration Enrichment Configuration

bits.bit7: Secondary injectors enabled (AMC and AIC outputs)
bits.bit1: Use ramp-out value as initial duty cycle, then ramp to 0
bits.name: Active Intake Control Configuration

bits.bit5: Reverse AMC Feedback polarity (feedback high when AMC on)
bits.bit3: Reverse AMC polarity (AMC off when output on)
bits.bit2: AMC on even if not in WOT condition
bits.bit4: AMC off when noise abatement active
bits.bit1: Only actuate valve if in WOT condition
bits.name: Active Muffler Control Configuration
bits.bit6: Override AMC reset if indeterminate key-on state

bits.bit1: Slave purge output to APR output
bits.name: Auxiliary Power Relay Configuration

bits.bit3: Blip number to read baro or ABP (Bit0)
bits.bit2: Blip number to read baro or ABP (Bit1)
bits.bit4: Select rising cam edge if set
bits.bit1: Blip number to read baro or ABP (Bit2)
bits.name: Baro Pressure Reading Setup
bits.bit6: Skip key-on baro read when engine rotates

bits.bit3: Use 0.1 ml incremental fuel scale factor
bits.name: CAN Bus Configuration

bits.bit4: Enable open loop learning
bits.bit1: Idle spark and fuel adjustment enabled
bits.name: System Configuration
bits.bit6: Enable fuel pump duty cycle lookup

bits.bit7: Log fuel pressure live data in flag5-flag7
bits.bit3: Enable speed and load pressure setpoint
bits.bit2: Enable pressure and bat injector correction map
bits.name: Fuel Pressure Controller Setup

bits.bit5: IAC run pos. is offset added to avg. IAC
bits.bit7: Use setpoint map (otherwise use setpoint table)
bits.bit3: Clutch or neutral required for IAC active
bits.bit2: Use IAC run pos. table above idle
bits.bit4: Enable start only when IAC pos. is above minimum start position
bits.name: Idle Air Control Configuration
bits.bit6: IAC start pos. value is offset added to avg. IAC

bits.bit3: Use larger of MAP values on accel
bits.bit4: Use smaller of MAP values on decel
bits.name: Load Setup 1

bits.bit4: CL, LCL, hyst, decel load select
bits.name: Load Setup 2

bits.bit5: Enable starter while plug cleaning is active
bits.bit3: Plug cleaning at key-on with WOT
bits.bit4: Stop key-on plug cleaning if engine cranked
bits.name: Plug Cleaning Setup

bits.bit3: Activate only if accel and WOT
bits.bit4: Use initial values
bits.name: Spark Advance Reduction Configuration

bits.bit5: Log SI input instead of AF1
bits.bit3: Reverse neutral signal polarity (high level with transmission in neutral)
bits.bit2: Reverse clutch signal polarity (high level with clutch engaged)
bits.bit4: Enable starter with shift light output
bits.bit1: Reverse sidestand signal polarity (high level with sidestand in)
bits.name: Starter Interlock Setup

bits.bit8: Enable air temperature spark retard feature
bits.name: Air Temperature Spark Retard Configuration

bits.bit7: Enable TPS reset on 3 throttle open/close
bits.bit3: Enable TPS0 fall only if TPS0 above TPSAZHL
bits.bit2: Enable TPS0 fall only until engine cranked
bits.bit1: Limit decrease to KTPSAZ_Step, bits 1,2 override
bits.name: TPS Auto-Zero Configuration

bits.bit3: Live data has VS_KPH instead of VSS_Count
bits.bit2: Live data has Gear instead of VS_RPM_Ratio
bits.name: Vehicle Speed Sensor Configuration

bits.bit4: 3rd prev
bits.name: Plug Cleaning Status

bitnames.name: AMC Startup Configuration
bitnames.text: Sidestand failure at end of last run

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 0
bitnames.text: Eng. Temp. Voltg. too low/broken wire

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 0
bitnames.text: Eng. Temp. Voltg. too high/short to ground

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 0
bitnames.text: TPS too high/short to supply voltage

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 0
bitnames.text: Cooling fan 1 (rear or right) short to ground

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 1
bitnames.text: Coil 1 short to ground or open

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 1
bitnames.text: Air Temperature too high/short to ground

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 2
bitnames.text: Tachometer output short to supply voltage

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 2
bitnames.text: Fuel pump short to supply voltage

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 3
bitnames.text: Fan 1 (rear or right) short to supply voltage

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 5
bitnames.text: Starter relay short to supply voltage

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 5
bitnames.text: AIC short to ground or open

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 6
bitnames.text: VS input short to supply voltage

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 6
bitnames.text: VS output short to ground/broken wire

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 7
bitnames.text: Fuel pressure sensor short to ground

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 7
bitnames.text: Fuel pressure sensor short to supply voltage/broken wire

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 8
bitnames.text: Crank sensor short to supply voltage

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 8
bitnames.text: MAP short to supply voltage/broken wire

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 8
bitnames.text: Baro short to supply voltage/broken wire

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 0
bitnames.text: Engine Temperature too high/short to ground

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 0
bitnames.text: TPS too high/short to supply voltage

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 0
bitnames.text: Cooling fan 1 (rear or right) short to ground

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 1
bitnames.text: Coil 1 short to ground or open

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 1
bitnames.text: Air Temperature too high/short to ground

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 2
bitnames.text: Tachometer output short to supply voltage

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 2
bitnames.text: Fuel pump short to supply voltage

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 3
bitnames.text: Fan 1 (rear or right) short to supply voltage

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 5
bitnames.text: Starter relay short to supply voltage

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 5
bitnames.text: AIC short to ground or open

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 6
bitnames.text: VS input short to supply voltage

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 6
bitnames.text: VS output short to ground/broken wire

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 7
bitnames.text: Fuel pressure sensor short to ground

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 7
bitnames.text: Fuel pressure sensor short to supply voltage/broken wire

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 8
bitnames.text: Crank sensor short to supply voltage

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 8
bitnames.text: MAP short to supply voltage/broken wire

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 8
bitnames.text: Baro short to supply voltage/broken wire

bitnames.name: Airbox Pressure Sensor Configuration
bitnames.text: Read and apply baro press. continuously

bitnames.name: Airbox Pressure Sensor Configuration
bitnames.text: Use Baro (instead of MAP) input for ABP

bitnames.name: Acceleration Enrichment Configuration
bitnames.text: Apply additional pulse on opposite injector in full accel.

bitnames.name: Acceleration Enrichment Configuration
bitnames.text: Accel corr. based on fuel table delta

bitnames.name: Acceleration Enrichment Configuration
bitnames.text: Accel corr. applied to fuel length (not raw map value)

bitnames.name: Active Intake Control Configuration
bitnames.text: Use ramp-out value as initial duty cycle, then ramp to 0

bitnames.name: Active Intake Control Configuration
bitnames.text: Secondary injectors enabled (AMC and AIC outputs)

bitnames.name: Active Muffler Control Configuration
bitnames.text: Only actuate valve if in WOT condition

bitnames.name: Active Muffler Control Configuration
bitnames.text: AMC on even if not in WOT condition

bitnames.name: Active Muffler Control Configuration
bitnames.text: Reverse AMC polarity (AMC off when output on)

bitnames.name: Active Muffler Control Configuration
bitnames.text: AMC off when noise abatement active

bitnames.name: Active Muffler Control Configuration
bitnames.text: Reverse AMC Feedback polarity (feedback high when AMC on)

bitnames.name: Active Muffler Control Configuration
bitnames.text: Override AMC reset if indeterminate key-on state

bitnames.name: Auxiliary Power Relay Configuration
bitnames.text: Slave purge output to APR output

bitnames.name: Baro Pressure Reading Setup
bitnames.text: Blip number to read baro or ABP (Bit2)

bitnames.name: Baro Pressure Reading Setup
bitnames.text: Blip number to read baro or ABP (Bit1)

bitnames.name: Baro Pressure Reading Setup
bitnames.text: Blip number to read baro or ABP (Bit0)

bitnames.name: Baro Pressure Reading Setup
bitnames.text: Select rising cam edge if set

bitnames.name: Baro Pressure Reading Setup
bitnames.text: Skip key-on baro read when engine rotates

bitnames.name: CAN Bus Configuration
bitnames.text: Use 0.1 ml incremental fuel scale factor

bitnames.name: System Configuration
bitnames.text: Idle spark and fuel adjustment enabled

bitnames.name: System Configuration
bitnames.text: Enable fuel pump duty cycle lookup

bitnames.name: Fuel Pressure Controller Setup
bitnames.text: Enable pressure and bat injector correction map

bitnames.name: Fuel Pressure Controller Setup
bitnames.text: Enable speed and load pressure setpoint

bitnames.name: Fuel Pressure Controller Setup
bitnames.text: Log fuel pressure live data in flag5-flag7

bitnames.name: Idle Air Control Configuration
bitnames.text: Use IAC run pos. table above idle

bitnames.name: Idle Air Control Configuration
bitnames.text: Clutch or neutral required for IAC active

bitnames.name: Idle Air Control Configuration
bitnames.text: Enable start only when IAC pos. is above minimum start position

bitnames.name: Idle Air Control Configuration
bitnames.text: IAC run pos. is offset added to avg. IAC

bitnames.name: Idle Air Control Configuration
bitnames.text: IAC start pos. value is offset added to avg. IAC

bitnames.name: Idle Air Control Configuration
bitnames.text: Use setpoint map (otherwise use setpoint table)

bitnames.name: Load Setup 1
bitnames.text: Use larger of MAP values on accel

bitnames.name: Load Setup 1
bitnames.text: Use smaller of MAP values on decel

bitnames.name: Load Setup 2
bitnames.text: CL, LCL, hyst, decel load select

bitnames.name: Plug Cleaning Setup
bitnames.text: Plug cleaning at key-on with WOT

bitnames.name: Plug Cleaning Setup
bitnames.text: Stop key-on plug cleaning if engine cranked

bitnames.name: Plug Cleaning Setup
bitnames.text: Enable starter while plug cleaning is active

bitnames.name: Spark Advance Reduction Configuration
bitnames.text: Activate only if accel and WOT

bitnames.name: Starter Interlock Setup
bitnames.text: Reverse sidestand signal polarity (high level with sidestand in)

bitnames.name: Starter Interlock Setup
bitnames.text: Reverse clutch signal polarity (high level with clutch engaged)

bitnames.name: Starter Interlock Setup
bitnames.text: Reverse neutral signal polarity (high level with transmission in neutral)

bitnames.name: Starter Interlock Setup
bitnames.text: Enable starter with shift light output

bitnames.name: Starter Interlock Setup
bitnames.text: Log SI input instead of AF1

bitnames.name: Air Temperature Spark Retard Configuration
bitnames.text: Enable air temperature spark retard feature

bitnames.name: TPS Auto-Zero Configuration
bitnames.text: Limit decrease to KTPSAZ_Step, bits 1,2 override

bitnames.name: TPS Auto-Zero Configuration
bitnames.text: Enable TPS0 fall only until engine cranked

bitnames.name: TPS Auto-Zero Configuration
bitnames.text: Enable TPS0 fall only if TPS0 above TPSAZHL

bitnames.name: TPS Auto-Zero Configuration
bitnames.text: Enable TPS reset on 3 throttle open/close

bitnames.name: Vehicle Speed Sensor Configuration
bitnames.text: Live data has Gear instead of VS_RPM_Ratio

bitnames.name: Vehicle Speed Sensor Configuration
bitnames.text: Live data has VS_KPH instead of VSS_Count
